meta.subject: english
meta.name: CET-4 大学英语四级核心词汇

cards.back: v. 废除；废止（法律、制度等）
cards.example: The government decided to abolish the old law.

cards.back: adj. 大量的；丰富的；充裕的
cards.hint: ab+und(波浪)+-ant，像波浪一样多=丰富
cards.example: China has abundant natural resources.

cards.back: adj. 学术的；学院的  n. 大学教师
cards.hint: academ(学院)+-ic，与学院相关=学术的
cards.example: Her academic performance is excellent.
Technology helps accelerate economic growth.

cards.back: adj. 可进入的；可获得的；易接近的
cards.hint: access(入口)+-ible，可以进入的=可达的
cards.example: The internet makes information more accessible.

cards.back: v. 容纳；为...提供住宿；迁就
cards.example: The hotel can accommodate 200 guests.

cards.back: v. 完成；实现；达到目的
cards.example: She accomplished all her goals this year.
He has accumulated a lot of experience.

cards.back: adj. 准确的；精确的；正确的
cards.hint: accur(注意)+-ate，仔细注意的=精确的
cards.example: The data must be accurate and reliable.
He acknowledged his mistake in public.
You need to acquire new skills for this job.

cards.back: adj. 足够的；适当的；胜任的
cards.hint: ad+equ(相等)+-ate，等同于需求=足够的
cards.example: Is this salary adequate for living here?
It takes time to adjust to a new environment.
The administration announced new policies.

cards.back: v. 提倡；主张  n. 倡导者；律师
cards.example: She advocates for environmental protection.

cards.back: adj. 侵略性的；好斗的；积极进取的
cards.example: His aggressive attitude caused problems.

cards.back: n. 替代方案  adj. 可供选择的
cards.example: We need to find an alternative solution.

cards.back: adj. 含糊的；模棱两可的
cards.hint: ambi(两边)+-guous，可往两边理解=含糊的
cards.example: His answer was ambiguous and unclear.
We need to analyze the data carefully.

cards.back: n. 周年纪念日；纪念日
cards.example: Today is our school's 50th anniversary.

cards.back: v. 预期；期望；提前考虑
cards.example: We anticipate high demand for this product.
Exam anxiety is common among students.

cards.back: adj. 适当的；恰当的  v. 拨款
cards.hint: appro+priate(自己的)，与之相符=适当的
cards.example: Choose appropriate clothing for the weather.
The project will take approximately 3 months.

cards.back: adj. 任意的；专制的；武断的
cards.hint: arbitr(裁判)+ary，凭一人决定=任意的
cards.example: The decision seemed arbitrary and unfair.

cards.back: v. 联系；联想  n. 伙伴；同事
cards.hint: as+soci(社会)+-ate，把人联在一起=联系
cards.example: We associate spring with new beginnings.
Don't assume the answer without checking.
The authority figures made the final decision.

cards.back: adj. 可获得的；有空的；可用的
cards.hint: avail(有用)+-able，能被利用的=可用的
cards.example: Is this service available on weekends?

cards.hint: capac(容纳)+-ity，容纳的量=容量/能力
cards.example: The stadium has a capacity of 50,000.
Books are sorted into different categories.
Under these circumstances, we must act fast.

cards.back: v. 同时发生；相符；一致
cards.hint: co(共同)+incide(落入)，落在同一点=巧合
cards.example: The two events coincide on the same day.

cards.hint: col(共同)+league(人)，共同工作的人=同事
cards.example: My colleague helped me finish the report.
Success requires total commitment.

cards.back: n. 成分；组成部分  adj. 组成的
cards.hint: com+pon(放置)+ent，一起放置的=组成部分
cards.example: Trust is a key component of a relationship.

cards.hint: con+cept(拿取)，把握住的想法=概念
cards.example: The concept of democracy is complex.

cards.back: adj. 具体的；实体的  n. 混凝土
cards.hint: con+crete(生长)，成形生长的=具体的
cards.example: Please give me a concrete example.

cards.back: v. 进行；指挥；引导  n. 行为；品行
cards.hint: con+duct(引导)，一起引导=指挥/进行
cards.example: We will conduct a survey next week.

cards.hint: con+fid(信任)+-ent，完全信任自己=自信
cards.example: Be confident when you give your speech.
Think about the consequences before acting.
Everyone should contribute to society.

cards.back: adj. 有争议的；引发争论的
cards.hint: contro+vers(转)+ial，转来转去争论=有争议
cards.example: This is a controversial political topic.
Music can convey deep emotions.

cards.hint: con+vince(征服)，在精神上征服=说服
cards.example: She convinced me to try the new food.
We must cooperate to solve the problem.

cards.back: adj. 批评的；关键的；危急的
cards.example: This is a critical moment for our company.
You should cultivate good study habits.

cards.hint: custom(习惯)+-ize，按个人习惯制作=定制
cards.example: You can customize your profile settings.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in 1776.
The temperature will decrease tonight.
Can you define this term for me?
Please demonstrate how to use this tool.

cards.back: n. 抑郁；沮丧；经济萧条
cards.hint: depress(压下去)+-ion，情绪被压下=抑郁
cards.example: Economic depression affected millions of people.

cards.hint: de+rive(河流)，从流中获取=衍生/获得
cards.example: Many English words derive from Latin.

cards.back: v. 献身；把...用于；致力于
cards.example: She devotes all her time to her research.

cards.back: n. 纪律；学科；训练  v. 训练；惩罚
cards.example: Self-discipline is key to achieving goals.
The teacher distributed the exam papers.

cards.hint: domin(主人)+-ate，像主人一样控制=支配
cards.example: One team dominated the entire game.
We need to eliminate all errors.
The teacher emphasized the importance of reading.
Parents should encourage their children's interests.
Reading can enhance your vocabulary.

cards.hint: e+norm(规范)+-ous，超出规范的大=巨大的
cards.example: The project requires an enormous amount of work.
We need to evaluate the risks first.

cards.hint: e+volve(滚动)，滚出来慢慢发展=进化
cards.example: Technology continues to evolve rapidly.
Please do not exceed the speed limit.

cards.back: adj. 独家的；排外的；专有的
cards.hint: ex+clus(关闭)+-ive，把别人关在外面=独家的
cards.example: This is an exclusive offer for members only.

cards.back: v. 展出；展览  n. 展品；展览
cards.example: The museum will exhibit rare paintings.
The company plans to expand overseas.

cards.back: adj. 明确的；清晰的；坦率的
cards.hint: ex+plicit(折叠)，完全展开=清晰明确的
cards.example: Please give explicit instructions.

cards.back: adj. 广泛的；大量的；大规模的
cards.hint: ex+tens(延伸)+-ive，向外广泛延伸=广泛的
cards.example: She has extensive knowledge of history.
Good tools facilitate the learning process.

cards.back: adj. 基本的；根本的  n. 基础原则
cards.hint: fund(基础)+-amental，处于基础的=根本的
cards.example: Honesty is fundamental to any relationship.
Solar panels generate clean electricity.

cards.back: adj. 真实的；真诚的；真正的
cards.hint: genu(出生)+ine，出生时就有的=真实的
cards.example: This is a genuine leather bag.

cards.hint: guard(保护)+-antee，作为保护的承诺=保证
cards.example: We guarantee the quality of our products.

cards.hint: hesi(停滞)+-tate，停在那里不动=犹豫
cards.example: Don't hesitate to ask for help.

cards.back: adj. 完全相同的；同一的
cards.example: The twins look almost identical.
Don't be ignorant of current events.
The lecture illuminated many key concepts.

cards.back: v. 实施；执行  n. 工具；器具
cards.example: We will implement the new policy next month.

cards.back: adj. 含蓄的；隐含的；绝对的
cards.example: There was an implicit agreement between them.

cards.back: v. 暗示；意味着；含有...的意思
cards.hint: im+ply(折叠)，折叠在言语中=暗示
cards.example: What does this sentence imply?
Exercise can increase your energy levels.
Research indicates that sleep is vital.

cards.back: adj. 不可避免的；必然的
cards.example: Change is inevitable in life.
Parents have a great influence on children.

cards.back: v. 整合；融合；使成整体
cards.example: We need to integrate all the departments.
How do you interpret this poem?
Police are investigating the crime.

cards.hint: just(公正)+-ify，使成为公正的=证明正当
cards.example: Can you justify your decision?

cards.back: v. 维持；保持；坚持主张
cards.example: It is hard to maintain a healthy lifestyle.
He tried to manipulate the results.

cards.hint: mean(中间)+while(时候)，中间的时候=同时
cards.example: Study for the test; meanwhile, get enough rest.

cards.back: v. 使最小化；减少到最低限度
cards.hint: minim(最小)+ize，使变到最小=最小化
cards.example: We must minimize the risks.

cards.hint: neg+otiate(闲暇)，处理非闲暇事务=谈判
cards.example: The two sides will negotiate a deal.

cards.back: n. 目标；目的  adj. 客观的
cards.hint: object(目标)+-ive，与目标相关=目的/客观的
cards.example: Our main objective is to reduce costs.
How did you obtain this information?

cards.hint: ob+stac(站立)+-le，站在面前阻挡=障碍
cards.example: Fear is the biggest obstacle to success.
Accidents can occur when people are careless.
Everyone is encouraged to participate.
How do you perceive this situation?

cards.hint: per+sist(站立)，一直站着不动=坚持
cards.example: Persist in your efforts and you will succeed.

cards.back: n. 潜力；可能性  adj. 潜在的
cards.example: She has great potential as a musician.

cards.back: n. 优先权；优先考虑的事
cards.example: Health should be your top priority.

cards.hint: pro+mote(移动)，向前移动=促进/晋升
cards.example: Regular exercise promotes good health.

cards.hint: pro+portion(部分)，各部分的关系=比例
cards.example: The proportion of women in science is growing.

cards.back: adj. 相关的；切题的；有意义的
cards.hint: relev(举起)+ant，举起来看=相关联的
cards.example: Please only include relevant information.
She was reluctant to leave her hometown.
She was chosen to represent the school.

cards.back: adj. 重要的；显著的；有意义的
cards.hint: signif(表示)+-icant，能表示出来的=显著的
cards.example: This is a significant achievement.

cards.back: adj. 具体的；特定的；明确的
cards.example: Please give specific examples in your essay.

cards.hint: strat(军队)+-egy，指挥军队的方法=战略
cards.example: We need a better marketing strategy.

cards.back: adj. 大量的；实质的；坚固的
cards.hint: sub+stant(站立)+-ial，有站立基础=实质的
cards.example: She made a substantial contribution.
Is there sufficient time to finish?

cards.back: adj. 可持续的；可维持的
cards.hint: sustain(维持)+-able，能维持的=可持续的
cards.example: We need sustainable energy solutions.

cards.hint: trans(穿越)+form(形式)，穿越形态=转变
cards.example: Education can transform a person's life.
Diseases can be transmitted through contact.

cards.back: adj. 易受伤害的；脆弱的
cards.hint: vulner(伤口)+-able，容易受伤的=脆弱的
cards.example: Children are vulnerable to online risks.
